scripts.dev:server: cd server && npx tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.build: cd server && npx prisma generate && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.start: cd server && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && npx tsx src/seed.ts && npx tsx src/index.ts
scripts.db:setup: cd server && npx prisma db push && npx tsx src/seed.ts
